summary: Promotions CRUD Admin UI testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Promotions Manager page verified with table, stats, form drawer with all required fields, filter tabs, and search functionality. Sidebar navigation confirmed under Growth & Affiliates section.
critical_code_review_comments: promotions_service.py: Correctly validates all required fields (name, code, scope, discount_type, discount_value, stacking_rule)
promotions_service.py: calculate_effective_discount() properly caps discount at tier's promotion allocation (lines 96-153)
promotions_service.py: referral_priority stacking rule correctly blocks promo when has_referral=true (line 117-118)
promotions_routes.py: Customer-facing /api/promotions/apply returns ONLY customer-safe output (no internal pool math exposed)
AdminPromotionsPage.jsx: All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
adminNavigation.js: Promotions Manager correctly placed under Growth & Affiliates section (line 81)
seed_data_creation: Test promotions created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Promotions CRUD fully tested. Backend APIs at /api/admin/promotions/* all working: POST (create), GET (list with filters), PUT (update), POST /{id}/deactivate, POST /{id}/activate, DELETE (soft delete). Customer-facing /api/promotions/apply returns customer-safe output only. Frontend at /admin/promotions-manager displays table with LAUNCH2026 and HOLIDAY5K promos, stats cards, filter tabs, search, and New Promotion form drawer with all fields.

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/promotions (valid): Creates global promotion with all fields, returns 200 with promotion object
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/promotions: Lists all promotions with total count
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/promotions/{id}: Updates promotion name and discount value
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/promotions/{id}: Soft deletes (status=deleted), promo no longer in list
backend_apis.POST /api/promotions/apply (valid code): Returns customer-safe output (discount_amount, message, no internal margins)
backend_apis.POST /api/promotions/apply (referral_pri: Returns blocked with referral priority reason
backend_apis.POST /api/promotions/apply (discount cap: Discount capped at tier's promotion allocation
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/promotions/stats/summary: Returns total, active, inactive, total_uses counts

frontend_ui.Promotions Manager page: Loads at /admin/promotions-manager with table and stats
frontend_ui.Sidebar navigation: Promotions Manager visible under Growth & Affiliates section
frontend_ui.Stats cards: Shows Total Promotions (2), Active (2), Total Redemptions (0)
frontend_ui.Promotions table: Displays LAUNCH2026 and HOLIDAY5K with code, name, scope, discount, stacking, uses, status, actions
frontend_ui.Filter tabs: All, Active, Inactive, Expired tabs work correctly
frontend_ui.Search functionality: Filters promotions by code or name
frontend_ui.New Promotion form: Opens drawer with all required fields: name, code, description, scope (global/category/product), discount_type, discount_value, stacking_rule (4 options), start/end date, max uses, customer message
frontend_ui.Form validation: Shows error messages for invalid input
frontend_ui.Info box: Displays promotion allocation rules (consumes only from promotion allocation, vendor base cost protected)

stacking_rules_tested.stack_with_cap: Can combine, capped at promotion allocation
stacking_rules_tested.reduce_when_affiliate: Value reduced 50% when affiliate is active
stacking_rules_tested.referral_priority: Blocked when referral is used (tested with has_referral=true)
